name_cn:
Brown calfskin medium in stock!!
Latest Bobby series, named in honor of Monsieur DI0R's pet dog, symbolizing loyalty and success, so this is a bag that can accompany you forever😘, combining classic and fashion, retro shape interprets the freedom, confidence and elegance of independent women💃🏻, love it to death❤️
